title: Aston Villa ends its 30-year trophy drought with 3-0 win over Freiburg in Europa League final
full_text:
Aston Villa ends its 30-year trophy drought with 3-0 win over Freiburg in Europa League final
Aston Villa ends its 30-year trophy drought with 3-0 win over Freiburg in Europa League final
ByThe Associated Press
May 20, 2026, 4:53 PM
ISTANBUL -- Aston Villa ends its 30-year trophy drought with 3-0 win over Freiburg in Europa League final.
